title: justicia glandulosa
intro: Justicia glandulosa, also known as the "Wild Jasmine" or "Justicia", is a tropical plant native to Central and South America. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and treating digestive problems. Herbal preparations of Justicia glandulosa can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and are often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being.
